## Problem Statement
Describe the problem or motivation behind this feature request.

---

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature or solution you would like to see implemented.

---

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

---

## Screenshots / Mockups
Add screenshots, wireframes, or mockups if applicable.

---

## GSSoC Information

- Difficulty Level: [Easy / Medium / Hard]
- Estimated Time Required: [e.g. 2 hours, 1 day]

---

## Additional Context
Add any other context or references related to the feature request here.
